column7:
Formula
haber + participle: he/has/ha/hemos/han + -ado/-ido

Use
Use present perfect for recent or experience-related past with present relevance.

column7:
Formula
que/donde connect clauses; porque/pero/aunque connect ideas

Use
Use connectors to make longer but still controlled Spanish sentences.
column8: Memorize the pattern first; the other cards in this topic make you use it.
column9:
- El libro que compré es bueno.
- La casa donde vivo es pequeña.
- Estudio porque quiero mejorar.
column10: que is often enough for who/that/which at this level.
column11: Good = remembered the formula and examples. Hard = remembered one part. Again = could not explain it.
